member.name: T:Prime.ThreadAlignmentService.IThreadAlignmentService
member.summary: This is the interface of the thread alignment Service.

member.name: M:Prime.ThreadAlignmentService.IThreadAlignmentService.AcquireOnlyMeLock(System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Function to Acquire the Only Me .
member.param: Max Wait Time in milliseconds for thread release.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThreadAlignmentService.IThreadAlignmentService.ReleaseOnlyMeLock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Function to Release the Only Me Lock.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThreadAlignmentService.IThreadAlignmentService.AnchorServicePreInstanceWrapperFunction(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Function wrap methods for the anchorService.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThreadAlignmentService.IThreadAlignmentService.AnchorServicePostInstanceWrapperFunction(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Function wrap methods for the anchorService.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.ThreadAlignmentService.ThreadAlignmentData.IpName
member.summary: Gets or sets the IpName value.

member.name: P:Prime.ThreadAlignmentService.ThreadAlignmentData.Locked
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether it is Locked.

member.name: P:Prime.ThreadAlignmentService.ThreadAlignmentData.TimeOutValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the TimeOutValue value.
